hints.text: Press <kbd>1</kbd>–<kbd>4</kbd> or <kbd>A</kbd>–<kbd>D</kbd> to select an answer without touching your mouse.
Hit <kbd>Enter</kbd> or <kbd>→</kbd> to move to the next question. Use <kbd>←</kbd> or <kbd>Backspace</kbd> to go back.
Press <kbd>F</kbd> to flag a question for review. Flagged questions show in amber in the sidebar.
The question navigator sidebar tracks answered (blue) and flagged (amber) questions at a glance.
You can change your answer any time before submitting — just click or press a different key to re-select.
On multi-select questions, ALL correct options must be chosen. Partial credit is not awarded on the real exam either.
Flag any question you're unsure about and come back later. Don't leave unanswered questions — eliminate wrong options first.
The Data Engineer Professional exam weights Structured Streaming & Delta Lake highest — together roughly 50% of questions.
Delta Lake's ACID properties come from its transaction log (_delta_log), not from Spark itself.
Know the three DLT expectation decorators cold: @expect (keep), @expect_or_drop (discard), @expect_or_fail (halt).
Time Travel requires both the transaction log AND the underlying Parquet files. VACUUM can break it if retention is too short.
Unity Catalog uses a 3-level namespace: catalog.schema.table. USE CATALOG and USE SCHEMA privileges are required to traverse it.
Auto Loader's default mode is directory listing — no cloud event infrastructure needed. File notification mode scales better but requires setup.
OPTIMIZE ZORDER BY co-locates related rows for data skipping. Combine it with regular VACUUM to keep the table healthy.
Structured Streaming append output mode requires a watermark for windowed aggregations — without it, Spark can't know when a window closes.
SCD Type 1 overwrites (no history). SCD Type 2 closes old rows and inserts new ones (full history). Know when each is appropriate.
AQE (Adaptive Query Execution) is enabled by default in Databricks. It handles shuffle partition coalescing, skew joins, and dynamic broadcast joins.
Python UDFs serialize row-by-row between JVM and Python — use Pandas (vectorized) UDFs for batch processing when you can't use built-ins.
The Silver layer should be cleansed and typed. The Gold layer is business-level aggregations. Keep these concerns separate.
DEEP CLONE copies data files and log. SHALLOW CLONE copies only the log and references source files — source VACUUM can break it.
A storage credential wraps a cloud IAM role or service principal. An external location combines a storage credential with a cloud path.
DLT Development mode keeps the cluster alive between runs for fast iteration. Production mode terminates it after each run.
APPLY CHANGES INTO in DLT handles CDC INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE natively with sequence ordering — no manual MERGE logic needed.
Spillage to disk (visible in Spark UI stage metrics) usually means a partition is too large for executor memory — reduce skew or increase memory.
One task taking 10× longer than peers = data skew. Enable AQE skew join optimization (spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true).
After submitting, the review page lets you filter by correct/incorrect and expand any question to read the full explanation.
Your progress saves automatically every 30 seconds. If you close the tab, you can resume from where you left off.
Row-level security in Unity Catalog is implemented with secure views using current_user() — not with GRANT WHERE syntax.
mergeSchema adds new columns from incoming data. overwriteSchema replaces the schema entirely. Know the difference.
Partition by low-cardinality, high-filter columns (e.g. region, year). Never partition by high-cardinality columns like user_id — creates too many small files.
